data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. GINGERS SISTER looks well placed to bounce back into form. She was strong winning two back, then simply didn’t fire when stretched in trip last start. Back to 1500m is a big plus, and with her turn of foot, she can round them up late. On top for us. 5. THINK LIKA WINNER never came into it when dropping back in distance last start, but his run here two back was much better. Jason Whiting returns to the saddle, and this is a softer assignment than what he faced last time. Each-way claims. 7. WIN TO RETIRE also did not see out the extra trip most recently, but her run over 1600m here two back was very solid. The Nakita Riordan 1.5kg claim helps, and from the good draw, she should be prominent throughout. Stick with her. 2. ETERNALLY YOURS draws well and should improve sharply with the fresh run under his belt. He is worth including in all top 4 combos.","runners":[3,5,7,2],"exclusive":true}
